# Bader Idris Portfolio

Expert Fullstack Engineering with a focus on immersive 3D web experiences, cross-platform architecture, and robust production DevOps.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework**: Nuxt 4 (SSR enabled)
- **Frontend**: Vue 3, GSAP (Motions), Sass (Styling)
- **3D Engine**: Three.js (WebGL)
- **Physics**: Rapier (via @dimforge/rapier3d-compat)
- **Cross-Platform**: Capacitor (Mobile), Electron (Desktop)
- **Database/Backend**: Prisma, Node.js, Socket.io
- **DevOps**: Docker, Nginx, Fail2Ban security jails
- **SEO**: @nuxtjs/seo (Schema.org, Robots, Sitemaps)

## Architecture Conventions

### Resource Loading
- Decentralized loading within components and composables (e.g., `Locomotive.vue`, `useTerrain.ts`) using standard Three.js loaders.
- Supports Draco mesh compression with local decoders.
- Implements non-blocking promise handling (`Promise.all`) to ensure scene interactivity even during partial load failures.
- Uses First-Party proxying for third-party scripts via @nuxt/scripts.

### Scene Composition
- 3D components like `Locomotive.vue` use dynamic composition to remain interactive even if individual assets fail to load.
- Terrain is managed by `useTerrain.ts`, utilizing splat maps with `NoColorSpace` for data integrity.

### Asset Pipeline
- Automated asset optimization (textures to .webp, mesh compression) integrated into the development and build process.
- Native Nitro compression (Gzip/Brotli) for all public assets via `nuxt.config.ts`.

## Key Directories

- `/app`: Nuxt 4 source directory (SRC dir pattern).
- `/app/components/three`: Immersive 3D UI and scene components.
- `/app/composables/threeD`: Core 3D business logic and service layers.
- `/server`: Nitro server-side logic, sockets, and Prisma models.
- `/public/assets/three/draco`: Local Draco decoders (gltf variant).

## Development Workflows

- `bun run dev`: Standard development mode.
- `bun run build`: Production build (Node/Nitro).
- `bun run typecheck`: Verify structural integrity.

## SEO & Discoverability

- Fully optimized via `@nuxtjs/seo`.
- Automated Schema.org injection for Identity, WebSite, and Technical Articles.
- Multilingual support via `@nuxtjs/i18n`.
